title: Ratatouille
ingredients: 2 small yellow crookneck squash, sliced (can also use zucchini)
2 medium green peppers, cut into strips
3 large tomatoes, peeled, seeded and diced
instructions: Sprinkle eggplant with salt and let stand for 30 minutes.
Drain the eggplant and wipe dry with absorbent paper.
Heat a little oil in a large pan and sauté eggplant and squash until golden on both sides.
Remove eggplant and squash and set aside.
Heat remaining oil in the skillet and sauté onion and green pepper over medium heat until soft, about 10 minutes, stirring frequently.
Stir in garlic and cook, stirring, until aromatic, less than a minute.
Top with tomatoes and simmer for 5 minutes longer.
Arrange alternating layers of eggplant and squash, tomato mixture, and parsley in a pot.
If there is too much liquid, remove the lid and simmer until liquid has evaporated.
notes: This may also be layered in a casserole dish and baked, covered at 350 degrees F for 30 minutes
Can use zucchini in place of yellow crookneck squash
